Project.title: Project
Project.description: A portfolio project to display on the site.

category.description: The category of the project (e.g., Thumbnails, Posters).

imageUrl.description: The URL of the project image.

date.description: The date the project was created or added (YYYY-MM-DD).

createdAt.description: The exact time the document was created.

Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: A contact form submission from a potential client.

name.description: The name of the person inquiring.

email.description: The email address of the person inquiring.

category.description: The project category they are interested in.

fileName.description: Optional name of an uploaded file.

date.description: The date the inquiry was submitted (YYYY-MM-DD).

createdAt.description: The exact time the document was created.
